description:
No spec subject

Review: simplicity M1 + spec L2. Review.build_view switched to build_v2 in the epic; v1 CoverageClosure.build/2 (~80 lines) now has zero callers and zero tests, yet its docstring claims it is 'used today', and coverage_closure.ex retains a stale 'build_v2 not wired yet — T7's job' comment the spec correctly contradicts. Delete the dead path (or ADR-note why it stays), fix the comments.
title: Remove dead v1 CoverageClosure.build/2 and stale wiring comments
